text: I was born in India and I moved to Indonesia when I was relatively young. I stayed there till my high school, around which time I moved back to India for high school and for my engineering studies. In terms of family, I have a sibling who is here in the United States and I have my parents who are currently residing in Indonesia.

sentence_segments.text: I was born in India and I moved to Indonesia when I was relatively young.
I stayed there till my high school, around which time I moved back to India for high school and for my engineering studies.
In terms of family, I have a sibling who is here in the United States and I have my parents who are currently residing in Indonesia.
